name: Furry Isekai RP
description:
Fantasy isekai where you are transported in a fantasy world, populated by beastmen where humans are considered mythic creatures. You are welcome to select how and where you appear. Using my own prompt now so let me know how it goes.

I am back again... kinda. Health has taken a dip and college has been rather rough. Still want to make bots for people to enjoy tho! Hope you have fun!

A suggestion by @Dhozdzy Thanks! Made this one into another interactive roleplay scenario where you can pick whatever you want. Will keep testing and tweaking it but sadly bots have some limitations.

Want to see me make a bot you want or have an idea for a setting or a scenario? Make sure to write it in my suggestion box!
creator: AlShep0778
